name: oath-desktop
description: Oath Desktop — heyoath.com 的桌面客户端
author: Oath

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd renderer && npm install
scripts.pack: npm run build:renderer && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build:renderer && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron-builder
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:renderer && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run build:renderer && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:renderer && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:all: npm run build:renderer && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron-builder -mwl
